title: Dhammacakkappavattana Sutta: Setting in Motion the Wheel of Dharma
description: Setting in Motion the Wheel of Dharma
introduction: Setting in Motion the Wheel of Dharma

translation.text: Bhikkhus, these two extremes should not be followed by one who has gone forth into homelessness: indulgence in sense-pleasures, and self-mortification. Avoiding these two extremes, the Tathagata has discovered the Middle Way.
